data.title: Garrett Motion Showcases Breakthrough Oil-Free Centrifugal Compressor Portfolio at China Refrigeration Expo 2026
data.description: Cutting-edge cooling technologies have established record-breaking levels of efficiency for cooling in data centers and battery energy storage systems. These advancements mark a significant leap in performance, ensuring optimal cooling for these critical facilities. The technologies have achieved unparalleled energy savings, with cooling efficiency reaching unprecedented levels. This groundbreaking development in cooling technology is anticipated to revolutionize the efficiency standards in data centers and battery energy storage facilities.

data.title: ATLATL Announces Agreement with Daiichi Sankyo to Deepen APAC Biotech Innovation
data.description: On April 7, 2026, in Shanghai, the ATLATL Innovation Center, a leading global platform for life science research and development, revealed a new partnership with Daiichi Sankyo. This collaboration will see ATLATL's diverse international R&D network being utilized in the joint efforts of the two organizations.

data.title: Global Barium Chloride Market Insights 2036: Regional Growth Led by China, India, and Germany with Strategic Moves by Solvay S.A. and Chaitanya Chemicals
data.description: On April 8, 2026, in Newark, Delaware, a recent market analysis conducted by Future Market Insights revealed that the global barium chloride market is experiencing consistent growth driven by infrastructure development. This growth is further fueled by the increasing demand for water treatment solutions. The market is witnessing sustained demand, with significant numbers indicating a positive trend in the industry.

data.title: Romania wins global recognition, CAHM Europe receives Green & Organic Award at 57th Cosmoprof Worldwide Bologna
data.description: In Bucharest, Romania on April 8, 2026, CAHM Europe, a Romanian company, was honored with the Green & Organic Award at the Cosmoprof Awards 2026, held as part of the esteemed Cosmoprof Worldwide Bologna 2026. This event is renowned worldwide for its focus on the beauty industry. The distinction, awarded to CAHM Europe, signifies the company's commitment to environmentally friendly and organic practices within the industry.

data.title: Japan Golf Tour Organization Establishes Japan Professional Golf Tour Co., Ltd.; New Structure Launched in Partnership with NSSK to Drive Growth of Japan Men's Professional Golf
data.description: On April 8, 2026, Tokyo witnessed the unveiling of Japan Professional Golf Tour Co., Ltd. (J-Tour) by the Japan Golf Tour Organization (JGTO). J-Tour, operational since March 17, 2026, is tasked with managing tour operations and driving business growth in the realm of professional golf in Japan. This transition demonstrates a significant step in the restructuring of golf operations in the country, marking a new phase in the industry.
Elis disclosed own shares trade from April 1-2, 2026.

data.title: Heimstaden AB (publ) Signs Divestment of Danish Development Project to Tishman Speyer
data.description: Heimstaden AB (publ) ("Heimstaden") has agreed to sell its development project at Else Sørensens Vej 25-33A, Rødovre in Greater Copenhagen ("ESV") to Tishman Speyer, a global real estate developer, owner, operator, and investment manager. The deal involves transferring all shares in Heimstaden ESV 25-35 ApS. The transaction is set to close in the second quarter of 2027. Christian Fladeland, Co-CEO and Chief Investment Officer of Heimstaden, mentioned that this sale will enhance their cash reserves and contribute to their ongoing efforts to reduce leverage. He also emphasized Heimstaden's successful history in developing premium residential properties.
